calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-18-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Donald F. Drummond, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:20am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Wendy Aragon appears as Pro Per Respondent, (Respondent Ana Sanchez does not appear, but Ms. Aragon represents to the court that Ms. Sanchez has agreed to her representing the case on her behalf as well.) Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Ms. Eder lodges a trial brief and evidence (not marked) and presents her case.
EXH1R Rental Agreement
EXH2R Rental checklist from SF rent Board
EXH3R Case filed against Appellant re a tenancy in Berkeley
9:45am
Matter is submitted. Evidence is retained by the Court. Evidence for respondents will be returned to Ms. Aragon as she was the respondent who appeared in court on jan-18-07.
